/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/Lab9.dir/Lab9_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab9.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab9.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Lab9.dir/mainsystem.cpp.o -o Lab9  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
